channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Burger King: BOGO Whopper — Watch Party Week
item.guid: Burger King-BOGO Whopper — Watch Party Week-2026-07-06
item.description: Buy one Whopper, get one free via the BK App during the FIFA World Cup Watch Party Week promotion. (Through July 8)

item.title: Domino's: Any Pizza for $9.99
item.guid: Domino's-Any Pizza for $9.99-2026-07-06
item.description: Order any pizza any crust (including Parmesan Stuffed Crust) with up to 7 toppings for just $9.99 via the app or online. (Through July 26)

item.title: Pizza Hut: BOGO Create Your Own Large Pizza
item.guid: Pizza Hut-BOGO Create Your Own Large Pizza-2026-07-06
item.description: Buy one large Create Your Own pizza and get a second free through the Pizza Hut app during Watch Party Week. (Through July 8)

item.title: Sonic: America $2.50 Menu
item.guid: Sonic-America $2.50 Menu-2026-07-06
item.description: Score the Jr. Double Cheeseburger, All-American Hot Dog, medium Onion Rings, or Red White & Blue Slush Float for just $2.50 each. (Through July 12)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box
item.guid: Taco Bell-$5.99 Luxe Cravings Box-2026-07-06
item.description: Get a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips & nacho cheese, and a medium drink for $5.99 via the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: $3.59 Three Grilled Chicken Tacos on Thursdays
item.guid: Taco Bell-$3.59 Three Grilled Chicken Tacos on Thu-2026-07-06
item.description: Every Thursday from 3–11 PM, Taco Bell app rewards members can grab three Grilled Chicken Tacos starting at $3.59. (Every Thursday)

item.title: Wendy's: $5 Biggie Bag
item.guid: Wendy's-$5 Biggie Bag-2026-07-06
item.description: Get a Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger or Crispy Chicken BLT, 4-piece nuggets, jr. fries, and a small drink for just $5 in the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: McDonald's: Free Medium Fries Every Friday
item.guid: McDonald's-Free Medium Fries Every Friday-2026-07-06
item.description: Get free medium fries with any $1+ purchase every Friday when you order through the McDonald's app. (Every Friday)

item.title: Chipotle: BOGO Entree — PGA TOUR Hot Streak
item.guid: Chipotle-BOGO Entree — PGA TOUR Hot Streak-2026-07-06
item.description: Watch the official @PGATOUR account on X or Instagram for a keyword drop, text it to 888222 for a BOGO entree code valid on a single visit. (Through Dec 31, 2026)

item.title: Panera Bread: Mix & Match Value Menu — $4.99 Each
item.guid: Panera Bread-Mix & Match Value Menu — $4.99 Each-2026-07-06
item.description: Panera's Mix & Match menu offers a rotating selection of soups, sandwiches, and salads priced at $4.99 each via the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Smoothie King: Free Upsize Friday for Rewards Members
item.guid: Smoothie King-Free Upsize Friday for Rewards Members-2026-07-06
item.description: Every Friday, Healthy Rewards members can upgrade from a 20 oz to a 32 oz smoothie for free when ordering through the app. (Every Friday)

item.title: Tropical Smoothie Cafe: Morning Happy Hour — $4.99 Smoothies Before 9 AM
item.guid: Tropical Smoothie Cafe-Morning Happy Hour — $4.99 Smoothies Bef-2026-07-06
item.description: Score any 24 oz smoothie for just $4.99 every day during morning happy hour from 7–9 AM at participating locations. (Daily 7–9 AM)

item.title: Tropical Smoothie Cafe: Refer a Friend — Both Get a Free Smoothie
item.guid: Tropical Smoothie Cafe-Refer a Friend — Both Get a Free Smoothi-2026-07-06
item.description: Refer a friend via your Tropic Rewards app referral code; once they join and spend $5, you both earn a free 24 oz smoothie. (Ongoing)

item.title: Domino's: $7.99 Carryout Special
item.guid: Domino's-$7.99 Carryout Special-2026-07-06
item.description: Get any 1-topping carryout pizza (excludes XL), 8-piece wings, or boneless chicken for $7.99 when you order online or in the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Subway: Classic Footlong for $5.99 via App
item.guid: Subway-Classic Footlong for $5.99 via App-2026-07-06
item.description: Rotating app promo codes offer a classic Footlong sub for $5.99 — check the Subway app for the current active code. (Ongoing (rotating))

item.title: El Pollo Loco: Loco Rewards App Exclusive Offers
item.guid: El Pollo Loco-Loco Rewards App Exclusive Offers-2026-07-06
item.description: Download the El Pollo Loco app and join Loco Rewards for member-only digital coupons on fire-grilled chicken bowls, salads, and burritos. (Ongoing)

item.title: Panera Bread: Exclusive Iced Coffees for MyPanera Members
item.guid: Panera Bread-Exclusive Iced Coffees for MyPanera Memb-2026-07-06
item.description: New Hazelnut Mocha, Rocky Road, and Snickerdoodle Iced Coffees are available exclusively to free MyPanera rewards app members. (Ongoing)

item.title: Chipotle: Summer of Extras — Bonus Entrees in App
item.guid: Chipotle-Summer of Extras — Bonus Entrees in App-2026-07-06
item.description: Activate Summer of Extras in the Chipotle app to unlock badges and entree rewards throughout the summer season. (Summer 2026)

item.title: Burger King: Whopper Wednesdays — Discounted Whopper
item.guid: Burger King-Whopper Wednesdays — Discounted Whopper-2026-07-06
item.description: Every Wednesday, BK Royal Perks app members can grab a Whopper at a discounted price via the app or website. (Every Wednesday)

item.title: Taco Bell: Tuesday Drops — App-Exclusive Flash Deals
item.guid: Taco Bell-Tuesday Drops — App-Exclusive Flash Deal-2026-07-06
item.description: Every Tuesday at 2 PM PT / 5 PM ET, Taco Bell drops new limited-time deals exclusively in the app for rewards members. (Every Tuesday)
